---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---


```{r}
#| label: fig-event-study
nhc_event_study_coef |>
  mutate(
    term = str_remove(term, "dist::"),
    term = str_remove(term, "nhc_event_day::"),
    sig = (conf.low > 0 | conf.high < 0)
  ) |>
  separate(term, into = c("dist", "day"), sep = ":") |>
  mutate(
    day = factor(
      replace_values(
        day,
        "friday_before" ~ "Fr",
        "saturday_before" ~ "Sa",
        "carnival_sunday" ~ "Su",
        "carnival_monday" ~ "Mo",
        "tuesday_after" ~ "Tu",
        "wednesday_after" ~ "We"
      ),
      levels = c("Fr", "Sa", "Su", "Mo", "Tu", "We")
    ),
    dist = fct_reorder(dist, parse_number(dist))
  ) |>
  ggplot() +
  aes(
    x = day,
    y = exponentiated_estimate,
    ymin = exponentiated_conf_low,
    ymax = exponentiated_conf_high,
    colour = sig
  ) +
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = c("Su", "Tu"),
    colour = "grey50",
    linetype = "11",
    position = position_nudge(x = -0.5)
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, colour = "grey70") +
  geom_pointrange(size = 0.25) +
  facet_grid(cols = vars(dist), rows = vars(crime_group), scales = "free_y") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    transform = scales::transform_log(),
    labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.1)
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(`TRUE` = "black", `FALSE` = "grey")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x.bottom = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0)
  )
```
